description_long: This sconce features a cylindrical, drum-like shade composed of evenly spaced vertical rods, creating a semi-transparent, cage-like effect. The central body is suspended from a decorative, twisted stem that attaches to the ceiling, suggesting a pendant-style mounting. The rods appear to be made of a dark, metallic material, while the stem and ceiling mount are lighter and possibly metallic or glass. The inner section of the sconce houses a light source, likely an LED or bulb, which is partially visible through the gaps in the outer structure. The overall design is modern and industrial, with a focus on geometric repetition and transparency. The fixture is both functional and decorative, suitable for contemporary urban interiors or exteriors.
description: A modern, cylindrical sconce with a cage-like metal shade and a decorative ceiling-mounted stem, featuring geometric and semi-transparent design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical cage structure and the central stem attachment.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view revealing the depth of the cage and the inner light source.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the symmetry and the even spacing of the vertical rods.
description_view_3: Rear view similar to the front, with the cage and stem clearly visible.
attribute_fixture_design: Modern industrial design with a geometric, cage-like metal shade and a decorative twisted stem. The style emphasizes transparency and repetition of vertical lines.
